critic_notes: Three Windows Server questions. Q001 (SYS.1.2.3.A3 Telemetrie) flags on PDF line-break normalization: the source has `Telemetrie-\nLevel 0` which normalizes to `TelemetrieLevel 0` while the quote keeps the hyphen-word as `Telemetrie-Level 0` — matches under aggressive no-hyphen-no-space normalization. Q002 is a descriptive question about which Windows versions the baustein covers; baustein_id is set but anforderung_type is null (idiomatic for Beschreibung questions across the corpus). Q003 passes cleanly.

issues.detail: Fragment `Um die Übertragung von Diagnose- und Nutzungsdaten an Micros...` — PDF line-break artifact (hyphen/whitespace drift); matches under aggressive no-hyphen-no-space normalization.
anforderung_type is null; idiomatic for descriptive (Beschreibung/Gefährdungen) questions across Kompendium corpus, but rubric prefers it set.
